base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of drakee_yellow_idle — a character from 1986 dragon quest. Drakeema — yellow Drakee palette. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Drakeema — yellow Drakee palette; healer enemy using Heal spell
